## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Other

## Scope check

- [ ] This change improves Quick Markdown for opening, editing, or sharing a
      single markdown file.
- [ ] I reviewed CONTRIBUTING.md and this change is in scope.

## Testing

- [ ] xcodebuild clean build succeeds
- [ ] Open/edit/save flow verified
- [ ] Preview/Source toggle verified
- [ ] Copy Formatted tested in a target app
- [ ] External file-change handling verified

## Linked issues

Fixes #

## Notes

Screenshots, follow-ups, or migration notes.
